rationale: Both papers centrally study store brands’ strategic role in retailer outcomes: the citing paper models multitier store-brand quality choices and channel profits, while the cited paper provides a theory (with evidence) that high-quality store brands increase loyalty and profitability. Given this strong conceptual overlap and the citing note’s emphasis on extending prior store-brand channel theory, this citation is plausibly foundational/theory-relevant rather than a passing mention (also supported by a direct DOI match).
